title: Torch Extras
body:
![text_logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84de32ba2e6a8e74be686efa2fd8c22bbacaac69.png)

Adds extra behaviors for torches: **Upside Down Torch**, **Wall Mounted Torch** and **Unlit Torch**.

### How to obtain
- **Upside Down Torch**: try putting a torch on the block's bottom surface.
- **Wall Mounted Torch**: put a torch on horizontal side while crouching.
- **Unlit Torch**: extinguish a **Torch** using splash potions.

Report bugs or give me a feedback on [Github](https://github.com/thebluetropics/torch-extras) or [Discord](https://discord.gg/A9hgghDk48).
